# terrible_cisco_mso_ndo_tenant_mld_snooping_policy (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `template` (String) The name of the tenant template.

### Optional

- `admin_state` (String) The administrative state of the MLD Snooping Policy. Defaults to `disabled` when unset during creation.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The description of the MLD Snooping Policy. Providing an empty string will remove the `description=""` from the MLD Snooping Policy.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `fast_leave_control` (String) The fast leave control of the MLD Snooping Policy. Defaults to `disabled` when unset during creation.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `last_member_query_interval` (Number) The last member query interval of the MLD Snooping Policy in seconds. Defaults to 1 when unset during creation. The value must be between 1 and 25.
- `name` (String) The name of the MLD Snooping Policy.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `querier_control` (String) The querier control of the MLD Snooping Policy. Defaults to `disabled` when unset during creation.
- `querier_version` (String) The querier version of the MLD Snooping Policy. Defaults to `v2` when unset during creation.
- `query_interval` (Number) The query interval of the MLD Snooping Policy in seconds. Defaults to 125 when unset during creation. The value must be between 1 and 18000.
- `query_response_interval` (Number) The query response interval of the MLD Snooping Policy in seconds. Defaults to 10 when unset during creation. The value must be between 1 and 25.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `start_query_count` (Number) The start query count of the MLD Snooping Policy. Defaults to 2 when unset during creation. The value must be between 1 and 10.
- `start_query_interval` (Number) The start query interval of the MLD Snooping Policy in seconds. Defaults to 31 when unset during creation. The value must be between 1 and 18000.
- `state` (String) Use `absent` for removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects. Use `present` for creating or updating.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the MLD Snooping Policy. This parameter is required when the MLD Snooping Policy `name` needs to be updated.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
